productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Green & Grey Eiger Backpack
description: Green and grey backpack with a black accent, has embroidered branding on the front and two loops for extra storage at the baseOne haul loop on the top, padded and adjustable shoulder straps with mesh inner, has stitched tab and loops for extra storage, branding on one strap with reflective detail and can be connected with adjustable tabs that have a click-claspHas a padded, adjustable and detachable waist belt secured with a click-clasp, has a zip pocket on oneTwo main zip compartments, one has a laptop sleeve secured with an elasticated tab that has a Velcro closure and a stitched tab secured with a Velcro closure that has a removable metallic detailAn external zip pocket on the frontMesh stash pocket with an elasticated mouth on both sidesHas click-clasp and adjustable tabs on the sides to adjust the sizePadded mesh backEco-friendly, PVC free and recyclableWarranty: 5 years carry-in warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
